title: "Filippo Brunelleschi: The Buildings" by Howard Saalman - Rocky Ruggiero
highlights:
##### "Filippo Brunelleschi: The Buildings" by Howard Saalman In this comprehensive study of the architecture of Brunelleschi, Saalman traces back to the ancient monuments that inspired the architect. He also considers the architecture from a political, religious, and economic context of the time they were built, as well as the patrons who commissioned his work.
